summary: Iteration 128: Frontend testing of draggable/repositionable CosmicToolbar, SmartDock, and Dashboard section reordering. All 18 test cases passed. Both toolbar and dock can be freely dragged with grip handles, positions persist in localStorage, and edge snapping works. Dashboard edit mode with pointer-based drag-to-reorder, arrow buttons, and visibility toggles all functional.
context_for_next_testing_agent: CosmicToolbar and SmartDock both have drag handles (GripHorizontal icons) with data-testid='toolbar-drag-handle' and 'dock-drag-handle'. Both use pointer events for drag and localStorage for persistence ('cosmic_toolbar_pos' and 'cosmic_dock_pos'). Dashboard edit mode entered via 'Customize' button, sections have GripVertical drag handles for pointer-based reorder.

cosmic_toolbar_drag.drag_handle_exists: PASS - data-testid='toolbar-drag-handle' found with GripHorizontal icon
cosmic_toolbar_drag.drag_repositioning: PASS - Toolbar moved from x=1726,y=12 to x=1276,y=102 after drag
cosmic_toolbar_drag.localStorage_persistence: PASS - Position saved to localStorage key 'cosmic_toolbar_pos': {"x":1276,"y":102}
cosmic_toolbar_drag.edge_snapping: PASS - Toolbar snaps to nearest edge when released (50px threshold)
cosmic_toolbar_drag.tap_to_expand_still_works: PASS - Clicking pill body toggles expanded state
cosmic_toolbar_drag.buttons_functional: PASS - Zen, Voice, Wake buttons all clickable and functional

smart_dock_drag.drag_handle_exists: PASS - data-testid='dock-drag-handle' found with GripHorizontal icon
smart_dock_drag.drag_repositioning: PASS - Dock moved from x=1598,y=938 to x=86,y=465 after drag
smart_dock_drag.localStorage_persistence: PASS - Position saved to localStorage key 'cosmic_dock_pos': {"x":86,"y":465}
smart_dock_drag.panels_still_work: PASS - Sage, Tones, Mixer panels all open correctly
smart_dock_drag.minimize_restore: PASS - Minimize button hides dock, restore dot appears and restores dock

dashboard_section_reorder.drag_handles_exist: PASS - Found 10 section drag handles (drag-handle-stats, drag-handle-pinned, etc.)
dashboard_section_reorder.arrow_buttons_work: PASS - move-up and move-down buttons reorder sections
dashboard_section_reorder.drag_to_reorder: PASS - Pointer-based drag on grip handles reorders sections
dashboard_section_reorder.visibility_toggle: PASS - Eye icon toggles section visibility
dashboard_section_reorder.add_shortcuts_sheet: PASS - data-testid='add-shortcuts-sheet' opens with 36 pin buttons
dashboard_section_reorder.save_layout: PASS - Done button saves layout via PUT /api/dashboard/layout

z_index_coexistence.both_visible: PASS - CosmicToolbar (z-index 9998) and SmartDock (z-index 79) visible simultaneously
z_index_coexistence.no_conflicts: PASS - No z-index conflicts between draggable components
